title: arenaria montana subsp. valentina
intro: Arenaria montana subsp. valentina, also known as Valentina Mountain Sandwort, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the carnation family. This plant is primarily used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Arenaria montana subsp. valentina include the treatment of various conditions such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of this plant often involve infusions or decoctions, which can be consumed as teas or used topically to aid in wound healing and skin conditions.
